title: circaea alpina subsp. pacifica
intro: Circaea alpina subsp. pacifica, also known as the Alpine Enchanter's Nightshade or Pacific Enchanter's Nightshade, is a plant species within the Circaea genus of flowering plants in the family Lythraceae. It is primarily found in the Pacific coastal regions of North America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, pain relief, and digestive problems, making it a valuable asset for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Circaea alpina subsp. pacifica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
